title: sticherus laniger
intro: Sticherus laniger, also known as the Woolly Rattan Palm, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marattiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Its extracts and leaves are used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including asthma, bronchitis, and skin problems. The plant's health benefits also include antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
